element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Player selects from PGA West, TPC Avenel, TPC Sawgrass, or Sterling Shores
Camera pans from hole to player starting position to establish spatial awareness

element_introduction_order.first_appears: Before starting hole and after each shot
element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Strategic planning aid showing full hole layout
Variable difficulty factor affecting ball trajectory and landing
3D contoured visualization for reading terrain and planning putt
Player competes against 60 unseen opponents with displayed statistics
Guidance system to aid player decisions

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Turn-based deliberative pacing allowing player-controlled shot timing with natural rhythm breaks between holes

difficulty_curve.early_game: Introduction through course familiarization and basic shot mechanics with multiple camera perspectives and overhead maps providing guidance
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Wind conditions and terrain variations increase challenge; putting green contoured grids require terrain reading skill
difficulty_curve.late_game: Tournament mode escalates with competitive pressure from 60 opponents and cumulative scoring across multiple holes
notable_spikes: Transition to putting (shift from overhead to contoured 3D grid perspective)
Tournament mode activation (introduction of competitive scoring system)

notable_level_patterns.description: Each hole follows standardized sequence: 3D preview → overhead map → shot execution → post-shot map → green approach → 3D contoured grid → putting
Four distinct courses (three real PGA courses plus one fictional) provide environmental and tactical variation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: PGA West, TPC Avenel, TPC Sawgrass, Sterling Shores

notable_level_patterns.description: Distinct game modes (Tournament, Driving, Putting, Practice) allow skill isolation and progressive mastery
